queries.question: What activities are common to all health programs?
queries.sql: SELECT Activities.activity_name  from Health_Promotion_Program_Activities join Activities on Health_Promotion_Program_Activities.activity_id = Activities.activity_id join Health_Promotion_Program on Health_Promotion_Program_Activities.program_id = Health_Promotion_Program.program_id   GROUP BY Health_Promotion_Program_Activities.activity_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Health_Promotion_Program_Activities.program_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Health_Promotion_Program)

queries.question: Show me the activity descriptions that are common across all of the programs
queries.sql: SELECT Activities.description  from Health_Promotion_Program_Activities join Activities on Health_Promotion_Program_Activities.activity_id = Activities.activity_id join Health_Promotion_Program on Health_Promotion_Program_Activities.program_id = Health_Promotion_Program.program_id   GROUP BY Health_Promotion_Program_Activities.activity_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Health_Promotion_Program_Activities.program_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Health_Promotion_Program)

queries.question: For each health promotion program, give me the name and description of activities.
queries.sql: select health_promotion_program.name , activities.activity_name , activities.description from Health_Promotion_Program_Activities join Activities on Health_Promotion_Program_Activities.activity_id = Activities.activity_id join Health_Promotion_Program on Health_Promotion_Program_Activities.program_id = Health_Promotion_Program.program_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?activity_name ?description WHERE {
  ?health_promotion_program_activities a :Health_Promotion_Program_Activities .
  ?activities a :Activities .
  ?health_promotion_program_activities p:hasActivities ?activities .
  ?health_promotion_program a :Health_Promotion_Program .
  ?health_promotion_program_activities p:hasHealth_Promotion_Program ?health_promotion_program .
  ?health_promotion_program p:name ?name .
  ?activities p:activity_name ?activity_name .
  ?activities p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: For every health program, list the activities used.
queries.sql: select health_promotion_program.name , activities.activity_name from Health_Promotion_Program_Activities join Activities on Health_Promotion_Program_Activities.activity_id = Activities.activity_id join Health_Promotion_Program on Health_Promotion_Program_Activities.program_id = Health_Promotion_Program.program_id

queries.question: What are the names and descriptions of the activities of each program?
queries.sql: SELECT Activities.activity_name, Activities.description  from Health_Promotion_Program_Activities join Activities on Health_Promotion_Program_Activities.activity_id = Activities.activity_id join Health_Promotion_Program on Health_Promotion_Program_Activities.program_id = Health_Promotion_Program.program_id   GROUP BY Health_Promotion_Program_Activities.activity_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Health_Promotion_Program_Activities.program_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Health_Promotion_Program)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the activities each health program uses.
What individual activity descriptions do we have for each program?
What are the names and descriptions of the activities of each program?
